use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation or settings
Showing author avatars alongside blog posts or comments
Representing team members in organizational charts or profiles
Indicating user identity in messaging or notification components
Serving as placeholder when user images fail to load
ai_summary: A minimalist Avatar component built on Radix UI primitives for displaying user profile images with automatic fallback support. Provides Avatar, AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback sub-components for complete user identity representation across any application interface.
